speaking_style: Brisk and authoritative. Speaks in short commands when busy. More forthcoming with those who carry themselves properly. Has a military economy of words.
backstory_seeds: earned enough in service to buy this place and runs it like a well-ordered camp
served in the same campaigns many of the regulars did and gets along with them for exactly that reason
has a rule for almost every situation and the rules are reasonable and evenly enforced
respects soldiers, ex-soldiers, and anyone who behaves like one — everyone else gets standard service
dual_role_context: Efficient and no-nonsense. Serves quickly, charges fairly, tolerates no nonsense. Will intervene in disputes before they escalate and knows how.
